rationale.R1.6: The rewrite significantly improves the clarity and conciseness of the text. The language is polished and reads smoothly.
rationale.RX.1: The summary clearly identifies areas where the original text hedges its claims and explicitly states the confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The summary accurately reflects the scope of the provided text and does not introduce any new topics or arguments.
rationale.RX.4: The summary avoids introducing any new errors or harmful content. It focuses on improving the clarity and accuracy of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: While the summary provides a good overview of the changes made, it could benefit from more detailed annotations explaining the reasoning behind each modification.
